center.name: 巴拉望島
center.summary: 巴拉望島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括巴拉旺孔雀雉、Fire-throated flowerpecker、黄腹花蜜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fire-throated flowerpecker (Dicaeum luzoniense) is a species of bird in the flowerpecker family Dicaeidae that is found in the Philippines except on the islands of Mindoro, the Palawan group and the Sulu Archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to the Philippines, the Palawan peacock-pheasant is found in the humid forests of Palawan Island in the southern part of the Philippine archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The garden sunbird (Cinnyris jugularis), previously known as the olive-backed sunbird, is a species of passerine bird in the family Nectariniidae that is found in the Philippines except on the Palawan island group
